description: Minimal deterministic parity fixtures for the verifier-first backend-wasm port.

cases.description: Checks canonical BLS12-381 Fr arithmetic and FieldSerde encoding against the native backend.
Checks ICICLE BLS12-381 Fr roots of unity, inverse roots, and power tables for small NTT domains.
Checks native 1D NTT forward and inverse behavior for both X-axis and Y-axis polynomial shapes.
Checks native 2D NTT forward and inverse behavior for row-major bivariate polynomial coefficients.
Checks native 2D coset NTT behavior and coefficient-scaling equivalence.
Checks native DensePolynomialExt bivariate evaluation over deterministic points.
Checks native ICICLE G1 MSM output for deterministic BLS12-381 bases and scalars.
Checks native BLS12-381 pairing product equality and inequality cases.
Checks native RollingKeccakTranscript challenge generation after deterministic byte, field, and G1 commits.
Checks a CLI-generated L2StateChannel proof bundle that the native backend verifier accepts.
